description: RAW_CLEAN_MISALIGNMENT due to unintended row drops or row_index recomputation
mitigation: Enforce row-preserving transforms with immutable file_id+row_index identity and automated row-count parity checks

description: CLEANING_BRANCH_INCONSISTENCY where branch labels differ between point rows and cleaning audit summary
mitigation: Derive branch and reason fields from a single policy mapping source and validate one-to-many consistency per file_id

description: TIME_AXIS_NONUNIFORMITY_PROPAGATION contaminates derivatives and segment metrics
mitigation: Carry time_quality and warning flags into point tables and gate derivative observables by quality_flag and minimum dt criteria

description: METADATA_PROVENANCE_INCOMPLETENESS for mass or labeling causes normalization ambiguity
mitigation: Keep provenance columns explicit allow NaN for unsupported normalized outputs and require derived_missing_reason codes

description: SEGMENT_MISCLASSIFICATION between increasing/decreasing and zfc/fcc/fcw classes
mitigation: Persist segment_source with reproducible segmentation parameters and add audit checks against metadata labels when available
Restrict derived computations to clean table interface and lint dependencies using declared source_columns metadata
Require explicit unit per numeric column and schema validation against mt_point_tables_schema.csv before publishing

description: OBSERVABLE_METHOD_AMBIGUITY reduces reproducibility of scientific outputs
mitigation: Require aggregation_method temperature_dependence and n_points_used for every observable row

description: FLOAT_COORDINATE_JOIN_DRIFT from using T_K or H_Oe or time_s as join keys
mitigation: Enforce immutable joins on file_id plus row_index only and treat coordinates as validation fields

description: SMOOTH_CHANNEL_MISUSE where M_emu_smooth is treated as canonical truth
mitigation: Keep M_emu_clean as structural truth and require explicit downstream method declaration before using smooth channel
